LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NIVANKA PARANAVITANA'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO PLEAD PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST GUNTHER GORSE-GREENHUT; CHRISTINA JERNIGAN; UDR WESTERN RESIDENTIAL, INC.; WINTERLAND SAN FRANCISCO PARTNERS, COLLECTIVELY OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE INDIVIDUALLY IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF BASES HER REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ON THE BREED OF DOG AND DEFENDANTS' PET POLICIES REGARDING CERTAIN BREEDS, BUT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ASSERTED THAT DEFENDANTS HAD ACTUAL KNOWLEDGE THAT THE DOG HAD DANGEROUS PROPENSITIES. CLARIFICATION: THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

Notice Of Motiona Nd Otion To Amend Complaint To Plead Punitive Damages Against
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael E. Gatto, Esq., from The Veen Firm, PC, 415-673-4800, for plaintiff and moving party
Jill Rizzo, Esq., from Le Clair Ryan LLP, 415-391-7111, for defendant and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF NIVANKA PARANAVITANA'S MOTION To Amend Complaint To Plead Punitive Damages Against Gunther Gorse-Greenhut; Christina Jernigan; UDR Western Residential, Inc.; Winterland San Francisco Partners, collectively or in the alternative individually is Denied. Plaintiff bases her request for punitive damages on the breed of dog and defendants' pet policies regarding certain breeds, but plaintiff has not asserted that defendants had actual knowledge that the dog had dangerous propensities.
Clarification: The motion is denied without prejudice. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
